title: Is Trending Stock Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) a Buy Now?
text: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Super Micro (SMCI) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

title: Super Micro Computer: Our Strategy Is To Buy The Dip
text: SMCI is up more than 25% in 2023 despite a recent selloff. The company is well-positioned to capture demand for high-performance rack server solutions that can accommodate AI applications.

title: Three Mid Caps Wall Street Sees Doubling Within 12 Months
text: Over the past 12 months, less than 1% of some 6,600 U.S. stocks have doubled or better. Macro and geopolitical pressures have been largely to blame, with the S&P 500 down 12% in this span.

title: Obscure Stock Screener Finds These Exceptional Stocks With 40% Growth

title: Supermicro Expands GPU Solutions Portfolio with Deskside Liquid-Cooled AI Development Platform, Powered by NVIDIA
text: Full-Stack AI Development Platform Provides an End-to-End Hardware and Software Solution with Petaflops of Performance for Building Accelerated Production AI, Ideal for Low-Noise Office Deployments SAN JOSE, Calif. , March 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Supermicro, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, is announcing the first in a line of powerful yet quiet and power-efficient NVIDIA-accelerated AI Development platforms which gives information professionals and developers the most powerful technology available today at their deskside.

title: 3 Tech Stocks Well Positioned For Growth At A Reasonable Price
text: Legendary fund manager Peter Lynch became famous for an investment strategy called  Growth at a Reasonable Price (GARP). While Lynch retired as manager of the Fidelity Magellan Fund in 1990 at only 46 (a testament to his success), the GARP strategy is still valid and can be applied today to stocks such as Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), Cohu Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU) and STMicroelectronics NV (NYSE: STM).

title: Supermicro Accelerates the Era of AI and the Metaverse with Top-of-the-Line Servers for AI Training, Deep Learning, HPC, and Generative AI, Featuring NVIDIA HGX and PCIe-Based H100 8-GPU Systems
text: Most Comprehensive Portfolio of Systems from the Cloud to the Edge Supporting NVIDIA HGX H100 Systems, L40, and L4 GPUs, and OVX 3.0 Systems SAN JOSE, Calif. , March 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Supermicro, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for AI/ML, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge, today has announced that it has begun shipping its top-of-the-line new GPU servers that feature the latest NVIDIA HGX H100 8-GPU system.

title: 7 Tech Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade
text: At first glance, the concept of tech stocks to buy might seem exceptionally risky at this juncture. After all, the market continues to digest the bank runs and failures of two major financial institutions.

title: Supermicro and Rakuten Symphony Extend Their Collaboration and Offer Complete 5G, Telco, and Edge Solutions For Cloud Based Open RAN Mobile Networks
text: With Rakuten Symphony, Flexible, Scalable, and Open Standards-Based 5G Networks Become Easier to Implement and Upgrade with Supermicro Application Optimized Servers SAN JOSE, Calif. and BARCELONA, Spain , March 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Supermicro, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, is announcing a close collaboration with Rakuten Symphony to deliver the next generation of servers and storage systems, for a wide range of workloads.
